category_sources: source_facts.description says "TUI todo manager"; official Dooit docs describe it as a TUI todo manager.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dooit; official documentation and repository present the project as Dooit.
docs_sources: Dedicated official Dooit documentation site linked from the official repository.

tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official Dooit docs support todo manager, TUI, terminal, and Python/customization tags.
